9:["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 mt-4 shadow-lg border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 mb-10","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 leading-tight mb-5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"Best Webcam for Video Calls in 2026: Tested for Remote Workers"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/authors/james-park","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"James Park","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"James Park"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Tech Reviewer"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","7 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"February 7, 2026"}]]}]]}]
a:["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-10 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"The built-in laptop webcam is almost always the worst camera in any video call. An external webcam costs less than a dinner out and permanently improves how you are perceived by colleagues and clients. Here are the best options."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"why-the-built-in-webcam-is-not-good-enough","children":"Why the Built-in Webcam Is Not Good Enough"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Built-in laptop webcams suffer from four structural limitations:"}}],["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Fixed position</strong>: The camera looks up at your face from below the screen, creating an unflattering angle and usually showing your ceiling as the background."}}],["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Small sensor</strong>: Tiny sensor means poor low-light performance. In a home office with typical overhead lighting, built-in cameras produce grainy, low-contrast footage."}}],["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Fixed focus</strong>: Many built-in cameras lock focus at a fixed distance and do not adjust to changes in position."}}],["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Poor autofocus</strong>: When they do have autofocus, it is typically slow and hunts visibly during calls."}}],["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A dedicated external webcam costs £60–200 and solves all four of these problems. It is one of the highest-impact, lowest-cost upgrades for remote workers who take video calls seriously."}}],["$","h2","7",{"id":"what-to-look-for","children":"What to Look For"}],["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Resolution</strong>: 1080p is the minimum; 4K sensors crop better and look sharper at 1080p output (Zoom and Teams cap at 1080p anyway). For most users, 1080p from a good sensor outperforms 4K from a poor one."}}],["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Low-light performance</strong>: A large aperture (f/2.0 or wider) and good image processing handles poor home office lighting significantly better than budget options."}}],["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Autofocus</strong>: Face-tracking autofocus keeps you in focus as you move. This is the feature most visible to the people you call."}}],["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Field of view</strong>: 65–78 degrees is the sweet spot for solo video calls. Wider angles (90+) are better for showing a whiteboard or including multiple people."}}],["$","h2","12",{"id":"the-best-webcams-in-2026","children":"The Best Webcams in 2026"}],["$","h3","13",{"id":"best-overall-logitech-brio-100-1080p-70","children":"Best Overall: Logitech Brio 100 (1080p) — ~£70"}],["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The sweet spot of quality, price, and simplicity. 1080p, excellent autofocus, good auto-correction that handles mixed and low lighting well. For most remote workers, this is the right answer."}}],["$","h3","15",{"id":"best-premium-logitech-mx-brio-4k-200","children":"Best Premium: Logitech MX Brio (4K) — ~£200"}],["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Genuinely excellent footage: 4K sensor, wide aperture, outstanding low-light performance, and Show Mode for displaying physical objects. The built-in microphones are better than average."}}],"$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16"]}],"$L17","$L18","$L19"]}],"$L1a"]}]
b:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
c:["$","$L1b",null,{"children":["$","$1c",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@1d"}]}]
d:["$","h3","17",{"id":"best-budget-anker-powerconf-c200-2k-45","children":"Best Budget: Anker PowerConf C200 (2K) — ~£45"}]
e:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Surprising performance at the price. 2K resolution, autofocus, privacy cover, and plug-and-play USB-A. A substantial step above any built-in camera at minimal cost."}}]
f:["$","h3","19",{"id":"best-ai-tracking-insta360-link-2-4k-180","children":"Best AI-Tracking: Insta360 Link 2 (4K) — ~£180"}]
10:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Uses AI to track your face and keep you centred as you move. The 4K sensor is excellent and the gimbal stabilisation is unique. Best for those who move around during calls."}}]
11:["$","h2","21",{"id":"lighting-matters-more-than-camera-quality","children":"Lighting Matters More Than Camera Quality"}]
12:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A £200 webcam in poor lighting looks worse than a £70 webcam with good lighting."}}]
13:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you add only one thing to your video call setup, make it a key light — a soft, adjustable LED positioned in front of you and slightly above eye level. The Elgato Key Light Mini (~£80) is the standard recommendation. For a full home office lighting guide, read our <a href=\"/blog/home-office-lighting-guide\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">home office lighting guide</a>."}}]
14:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The ideal video call setup:"}}]
15:["$","ol","25",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"External webcam positioned at eye level"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Key light in front of you, slightly above and to one side"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Clean, uncluttered background"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Wired or strong Wi-Fi connection"}}]]}]
16:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"That combination — regardless of camera quality — will make you look professional on every call."}}]
